profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Data Sinergitama Jaya Tbk provides IT infrastructure and managed services in Indonesia. It offers managed cloud, collocation, managed network, infrastructure as a service, and disaster recovery as a service. The company also provides knowledge management, medical data integrator, smart city, and video monitoring and data management solutions. PT Data Sinergitama Jaya Tbk was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.
